parameters-en.Osc1 Freq: Controls the frequency of Oscillator 1, from 20 Hz to 10.0 kHz.
parameters-en.Osc1 Pan: Controls the panning of Oscillator 1 between the left and right channels.
parameters-en.Osc2 Freq: Controls the frequency of Oscillator 2, from 20 Hz to 10.0 kHz.
parameters-en.Osc2 Pan: Controls the panning of Oscillator 2 between the left and right channels.
parameters-en.Osc3 Freq: Controls the frequency of Oscillator 3, from 20 Hz to 10.0 kHz.
parameters-en.Osc3 Pan: Controls the panning of Oscillator 3 between the left and right channels.
parameters-en.Osc4 Freq: Controls the frequency of Oscillator 4, from 20 Hz to 10.0 kHz.
parameters-en.Osc4 Pan: Controls the panning of Oscillator 4 between the left and right channels.
parameters-en.Attack: Controls how fast the 4 OSC Generator fades in when engaged, from 10 ms to 10 sec.
parameters-en.Decay: Controls how fast the 4 OSC Generator fades out when bypassed, from 10 ms to 10 sec.
parameters-en.Dry Level: Controls the level of the dry signal.
parameters-en.Dry Pan: Controls the panning of the dry signal between the left and right channels.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
